title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono argues that competing with AI on knowledge is futile for humans, and that true intelligence in the age of AI is defined by curiosity and human judgment rather than knowledge accumulation. Drawing on Ramanujan's legacy, he contends that identifying and nurturing unconventional genius remains a distinctly human capacity.
